one_line_verdict: A whimsical cross-species rom-com best suited for animation lovers and date nights — charming enough to catch in theaters, but equally enjoyable as a cozy streaming pick.
english_note: Light, conversational dialogue with simple fantasy vocabulary — very accessible for most viewers.
credits_detail: No credits scene — speculative based on the film's lighthearted comedy-fantasy tone and genre conventions.
one_line_summary: A bubbly mermaid princess rom-com with heart — perfect for dreamers and hopeless romantics.
